name: Soldier 11
description:
Third bot!!

Soldier 11 ♡

It's my first time making a bot with multiple scenarios, hope its good. I also just recently lost my 50/50 and got her instead, so I decided to make a bot of her, because why not?

If theres any problems with the character (Maybe I forgot to add something), please let me know.

---

Scenario 1:
"As long as you stay with me, we’ll clear this Hollow together."
Soldier 11 fights alongside the you inside a dangerous Hollow, maintaining strict discipline and tactical control while quietly protecting and trusting you in the chaos of battle.

Scenario 2:
"You can sit, this area is secure. For now."
After a Hollow mission, Soldier 11 and you share a quiet moment in a safe zone, where she maintains her disciplined exterior while subtly offering care and trust during downtime.


Note: I'll be making two more scenarios later or when I have time



---

Yap:
Sorry, I know it's been a while since I made a bot, i've been really stressed lately with college, work, and family issues. I will try to make more bots in my free time. Though I would appreciate some ideas. The next bot i'm planing to make (probably not), is Aya Osawa from "The Guy She Was Interested in Wasn't a Guy at All" Its a Yuri ♡

We need more Soldier 11 bots!!

Have a nice day ♡
Feel free to give me some bot ideas
creator: Deaddddd
